title: garcinia quadrifaria
intro: Garcinia quadrifaria is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the four-leaved garcinia or four-leaved mangosteen. It is a small tree or shrub native to tropical Africa, and its medicinal properties have been used in traditional medicine for various health benefits. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting weight loss. Garcinia quadrifaria can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
